arts.ttl: Arsenal and Man City's toxic rivalry offers perfect antidote to sanitised Premier League
arts.sum: Manchester City vs Arsenal has turned to where clashes of yesteryear between Arsenal and Manchester United found themselves - sitting firmly amid a sea of spite and loathing from both sides

arts.ttl: How to watch Man City vs Watford: TV channel and live stream for Carabao Cup game today
arts.sum: City back in action just two days after draw with Arsenal

arts.ttl: Tuesday's EFL Cup predictions including Man City vs. Watford
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's EFL Cup fixtures, including Manchester City vs. Watford.

arts.ttl: Man City have the perfect response for Arsenal after angry rants
arts.sum: Manchester City players were not happy after Sunday's game with Arsenal but can make their point on the pitch on Tuesday

arts.ttl: Why Man City have been forced to play again just 48 hours after gruelling Arsenal match
arts.sum: Manchester City have only just caught their breath from this weekend's clash with Arsenal but will have to lace up again with just a short rest thanks to their rivals

arts.ttl: Man City predicted lineup vs Watford
arts.sum: GK: Stefan Ortega - There really isn't much to separate Ederson and Ortega anymore, with the latter set to start every domestic cup fixture this season. Simpson-Pusey could make his first competitive start for the senior side on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Man City vs Watford: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Manchester City will be hoping for a less hectic outing at the Etihad Stadium on Tuesday as they take on Championship side Watford in the third round of the Carabao Cup. Rodri was unlikely to start on Tuesday anyway, but the knee injury he sustained on Sunday in the draw with Arsenal looks to have ruled him out for the rest of the season .

arts.ttl: Rodri injury: 3 ways Man City can cope with season-ending ACL blow
arts.sum: Zubimendi was fantastic when he came on for the injured Rodri in the final, providing both the defensive might - winning 100% of his duels - and offensive prowess - completing 92% of his passes - that we're accustomed to seeing from City's superstar midfielder. It's worth remembering that, prior to this week, Rodri had actually not started a single game for Manchester City this season due to a hamstring injury picked up in the Euro 2024 final.

arts.ttl: Richard Keys claims Michael Oliver 'dropped a b******' by not cautioning Jeremy Doku before sending Leandro Trossard off in Arsenal's hot-tempered draw with Man City
arts.sum: The Spaniard was left incensed by Leandro Trossard 's two yellow cards and clearly made his feelings known on the booking for delaying a restart.

arts.ttl: Arsenal defender Gabriel warns Man City his side are 'waiting for them' at the Emirates Stadium as he breaks his silence on Erling Haaland's 'provocative' ball throw at the Etihad
arts.sum: Arsenal centre-back Gabriel Magalhaes has issued a warning to title rivals Manchester City after Sunday's fierce encounter at the Etihad.
